name: gpd-arxiv
description: Optional/conditional arXiv paper search, retrieval, and source-archive download via arxiv-mcp-server. Available only when the optional arxiv-mcp-server dependency is installed; search for physics papers, fetch abstracts, download full text, and download raw source archives.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.

python_module.notes: Replace `${GPD_PYTHON}` with a Python >=3.11 interpreter that has GPD installed.

availability_condition: Available only when the optional Python module 'arxiv_mcp_server' is installed.
